summary: Verified 4 major regression fixes after HUD Layout customization integration. All reported issues are RESOLVED: 1) NavigationHUD is visible at top-center with z-index 3100, 2) Speed Limit sign is in top-left corner NOT overlapping NavigationHUD, 3) Route Comparison Panel shows 3 alternatives at bottom without overlapping arrival HUD, 4) Route simulation shows user icon and route line correctly. Display Layout tab functions correctly with all 18 HUD elements toggleable.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: NavigationHUD positioned at top-center with z-index 3100 (above WarningBanners z-3000)
VERIFIED: SpeedLimitMarker moved to z-[1999] as sibling of NavigationHUD, positioned top-left
VERIFIED: Route Comparison Panel shows PRIMARY, ALT 1, ALT 2 with time/distance/fuel cost
VERIFIED: Arrival HUD shows road name, speed, distance, time, ETA at bottom
VERIFIED: Truck Restrictions and Route Hazards panels on left side, not blocking NavigationHUD
VERIFIED: Weather panel visible on left side
VERIFIED: Display Layout tab loads with Live Preview showing all 18 HUD elements
VERIFIED: Show All/Hide All/Reset buttons functional in Display Layout
VERIFIED: Trip Panel Position toggle (LEFT/RIGHT) working
VERIFIED: Navigation category shows Turn Instructions, Lane Guidance, Speed Display, Arrival Bar, Maneuver Preview

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 reported regressions are FIXED. NavigationHUD visible at top-center (z-3100), Speed Limit sign in top-left (z-1999), Route Comparison Panel at bottom with 3 alternatives, Arrival HUD at bottom showing road/speed/distance/time/ETA. Display Layout tab fully functional with 18 toggleable HUD elements. Test flow: Guest Login -> Navigation -> Search 'Dallas, Texas' -> Click suggestion -> Wait for route calculation -> Route Comparison shows PRIMARY/ALT1/ALT2 -> Click Close -> Driving mode shows NavigationHUD + Arrival HUD + Speed Limit sign without overlaps.

navigation_hud_visibility.details: NavigationHUD visible at top-center showing 'Head toward S 8th St on W Broadway. Go for 1312 ft.' with arrow icon and distance

route_comparison_panel.details: Route Comparison Panel shows PRIMARY (9h 44m, 661.4 mi, $358.17), ALT 1 (10h 27m, 674.3 mi, $365.15), ALT 2 (10h 34m, 694.3 mi, $376.00)

speed_limit_overlay.details: Speed Limit sign (35 mph) visible in top-left corner, NOT overlapping NavigationHUD

arrival_hud.details: Arrival HUD at bottom shows road name (W BROADWAY, GO), speed (0 mph), distance (661.4 mi), time (9h 44m), ETA (4:59 AM)

truck_restrictions_panel.details: Truck Restrictions panel on left side showing toll booth transponder requirement

route_hazards_panel.details: Route Hazards panel on left side showing FOG/LOW VIS weather warning

weather_panel.details: Weather panel on left side showing 49° CLOUDY with wind and visibility info

display_layout_tab.details: Display Layout tab loads with Live Preview, 18/18 elements visible, Show All/Hide All/Reset buttons functional

trip_panel_position_toggle.details: Trip Panel Position toggle (LEFT/RIGHT) working correctly

hud_element_categories.details: Navigation, Panels, Signs categories all present with drag handles for reordering

issue_1_navigation_hud_missing.details: NavigationHUD now visible at top-center with z-index 3100, positioned with explicit CSS (top:0.75rem, left:50%, transform:translateX(-50%))

issue_2_speed_limit_overlapping_header.details: SpeedLimitMarker moved to z-[1999] and positioned in top-left corner, no longer overlapping NavigationHUD

issue_3_reroute_ui_overlapping_arrival_b.details: Route Comparison Panel at bottom does not overlap Arrival HUD when driving mode starts

issue_4_route_simulation_stuck.details: Route line and user icon visible on map, simulation refs reset when new route starts
